title: Explain Pain
description: A groundbreaking book explaining modern pain neuroscience and how understanding pain can reduce it, written for clinicians and participants.

title: Therapeutic Neuroscience Education
subjects: pain science;neuroscience education;chronic pain group;professional education;PNE
description: A manual for teaching participants the neuroscience of their pain, with evidence-based scripts and visual aids.

title: Willard and Spackman's Occupational Therapy
description: The standard comprehensive textbook of Occupational Therapy, covering theory, practice, and evidence.

title: Canadian Occupational Performance Measure (goal measure) - 5th Edition
description: The manual for administering and scoring the goal measure, a client-centered outcome measure used to detect change in a person's self-perception of occupational performance.

title: Japanese Home Cooking: Simple Meals, Authentic Flavors
description: A comprehensive guide to traditional Japanese home cooking, covering dashi, soba, rice dishes, pickles, and more.

title: Cook Korean!: A Comic Book with Recipes
description: A manga-style cookbook teaching Korean home cooking classics, including kimchi, bibimbap, japchae, and pajeon.

title: Hiking Montana
description: A comprehensive trail guide to hiking in Montana, including routes in the Bitterroot, Bob Marshall, and Glacier areas.

title: Into the Wild
description: The story of Christopher McCandless, who walked into the Alaskan wilderness and died there, from Outside contributing editor Jon Krakauer.

title: Why We Sleep: Unlocking the Power of Sleep and Dreams
description: A neuroscientist's investigation into sleep's role in health, memory, creativity, and longevity.

title: Atomic Habits: An Easy and Proven Way to Build Good Habits and Break Bad Ones
description: A practical guide to building good habits through small incremental changes, with applications to health and performance.

title: The Body Keeps the Score: Brain, Mind, and Body in the Healing of Trauma
description: Landmark book on how trauma reshapes mind and body, drawing on decades of professional experience and neuroscience research.

title: Splinting the Hand and Upper Extremity: Principles and Process
description: A professional reference for occupational and physical therapists on fabricating and applying hand and upper extremity splints.

title: An Occupational Perspective of Health
description: Foundational occupational science text linking human occupation - doing, being, and becoming - to health.

title: Hiking the Bob Marshall Wilderness Complex
description: A detailed trail guide to the Bob Marshall, Scapegoat, and Great Bear Wilderness areas of northwestern Montana.

title: The Challenge of Pain
description: Classic text co-authored by the gate control theory's co-developer, explaining the neuroscience and psychology of pain.

title: Acceptance and Commitment Therapy: An Experiential Approach to Behavior Change
description: Foundational text introducing ACT, the evidence-based psychotherapy combining acceptance and mindfulness strategies with behavior change.

title: Explain Pain Supercharged
subjects: pain science;neurophysiology;chronic pain group;pain education;coach guide
description: The coach's handbook for Explain Pain, providing structured educational content and the conceptual framework behind pain neuroscience education.

title: Hiking Glacier and Waterton Lakes National Parks
description: Comprehensive guide to trails in Glacier and Waterton Lakes National Parks, including day hikes and multi-day routes.

title: Into Thin Air: A Personal Account of the Mount Everest Disaster
description: Krakauer's first-person account of the 1996 Everest disaster that killed eight climbers.

title: Graded Motor Imagery Handbook
subjects: pain;graded motor imagery;GMI;complex regional pain;hand therapy;HTCC
description: Professional manual for implementing the three-stage GMI protocol (left/right discrimination, motor imagery, mirror therapy) in chronic pain group management.

title: The Complete Walker IV
description: The classic definitive guide to backpacking, covering all aspects of gear, meal, navigation, and wilderness travel.
